resources.string: Press shutter button to capture\ndata of central area of screen.
Creates a vivid look by\nemphasizing color tones.
Creates the look of an aged photo with sepia color tones and faded contrast.
Creates the look of a old photo with soft colors and reduced contrast.
Creates an image with high contrast in black and white.
This creates a black-and-white image with rich tones and detailed reproduction.\nThe shutter opens three times.
You can shoot with unique appearance, selecting your desired effect from the various effects.
Creates an image which retains the specified color, but converts others to black and white. You can choose up to 2 colors and also make minor adjustments.
Creates an image which retains the color red, but converts others to black and white.\nYou can make minor adjustments of the colored areas.
Creates an image which retains the color green, but converts others to black and white. You can make minor adjustments of the colored areas.
Creates an image which retains the color blue, but converts others to black and white. You can make minor adjustments of the colored areas.
Creates an image which retains the color yellow, but converts others to black and white. You can make minor adjustments of the colored areas.
Creates an image which retains the color specified in \"Custom Setup\", but converts others to black and white. You can make minor adjustments of the colored areas.
Specify the color to be retained by touching the screen or pressing the shutter button.\nThe image is not saved.
Specify the color to be retained by pressing the shutter button.\nThe image is not saved.
Press shutter button to capture data of central area of screen.\nYou can also capture the color of the area that was touched.
Could not specify color\nsince the color hues are too limited.
Creates a vivid and blurred image, as if the scene was a miniature model.\nShoot images in richer color by combining the effects of retro photo and toy camera.
Creates a soft feel with shaded corners and reduced sharpness. You can achieve various tones adjusting the color hue or darkness of the screen surrounding.
Shoots in a natural color hue.
Shoots with a warm red tone.
Shoots with a cool bluish tone.
Creates the effect of a green filter applied to the image.
Creates the effect of a magenta filter applied to the image.
Shoots with a faint blue tone.
Shoots with a faint green tone.
Shoots with a faint pink tone.
The blurred section is determined by AF and the way you hold the device.
The top part of the screen is sharp and the rest is greatly blurred.
The center of the screen is sharp and the top and bottom parts are greatly blurred.
The bottom part of the screen is sharp and the rest is greatly blurred.
The right part of the screen is sharp and the rest is greatly blurred.
The center of the screen is sharp and the right and left parts are greatly blurred.
The left part of the screen is sharp and the rest is greatly blurred.
Creates an image having bright, gentle mood, soft colors with reduced contrast.
Adds smear and blur effects to create an image as if painted with watercolors.
Creates an image like an illustration by emphasizing the contour.
Creates a high contrast, abstract look in black and white or primary colors.
Creates an image with only black and white.
Creates an image with only primary colors.
Creates the impression of being enveloped in soft light.
Creates an image with enhanced color and details like a painting.\nThe shutter opens 3 times.
